sections.title: Need To / Needed To — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Need To / Needed To — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Need To / Needed To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + need/needs to (present) / needed to (past) + base verb. Rules: 'Need to' shows present necessity, 'Needed to' shows past necessity | 'Needs' with he/she/it, 'need' with I/you/we/they | Negative: do not need to / did not need to (means it is not necessary) | Similar to 'have to' but usually softer/personal necessity
sections.formula: Subject + need/needs to (present) / needed to (past) + base verb

examples.hindi: मुझे यह काम पूरा करना है।
examples.english: I need to finish this work.

examples.hindi: मुझे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ा।
examples.english: I needed to finish this work.
He needs to see a doctor.
He needed to see a doctor.
We need to drink more water.
We needed to drink more water.

sections.title: Need To / Needed To — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Need To / Needed To — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Need To / Needed To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + need/needs to (present) / needed to (past) + base verb

examples.english: I need to make this decision.
I needed to make this decision.
She needs to take rest.
She needed to take rest.
Do you need to do this?
Did you need to do this?

sections.title: Need To / Needed To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Need To / Needed To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Need To / Needed To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + need/needs to (present) / needed to (past) + base verb

examples.english: We need to get more information.
We needed to get more information.
I need to do this quickly.
I needed to do this quickly.

sections.title: Need To / Needed To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Need To / Needed To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Need To / Needed To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + need/needs to (present) / needed to (past) + base verb

examples.english: He needs to correct this.
He needed to correct this.
We need to practice.
We needed to practice.
